outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected. Positive GEX suppresses price action, pinning spot near structural levels.
outlook.summary: Market is in a highly positive gamma regime (Total GEX 4.43B), indicating suppressed volatility and mean-reverting behavior. Spot is trapped between the Monthly Gamma Flip at 614.2 and massive structural support at 590. The absolute strike 600 acts as a powerful magnetic vortex across all expirations. Bearish monthly skew and distant Max Pain levels (585-590) suggest a subtle downward gravitational pull, but positive dealer hedging flows will likely keep price action localized and well-defined.

levels.motivazione: Monthly Gamma Flip level. Crossing above this shifts the monthly structure into positive dealer hedging territory, likely accelerating upward momentum.
Major Call OI confluence between 0DTE (17.5k) and Monthly (19.2k) expirations. Heavy dealer short gamma calls create a rigid upside barrier.
Highest Call Open Interest in the Weekly expiration (14,897). Acts as the immediate short-term resistance capping the upside.
RESONANCE: Massive OI across all three expiries (0DTE 21.9k, Weekly 14.7k, Monthly 83.4k). Positive total GEX creates intense magnetic attraction to this massive round-number strike.
Monthly Max Pain and heavy Put OI confluence (Weekly 9.4k, Monthly 29.3k). Aligns with the bearish monthly skew sentiment as the ultimate structural floor.
Massive Monthly Put OI (75.4k) combined with active Weekly Put volume. This is the hard floor for options hedging, reinforcing the broader 590 support structure.

levels.motivazione: Strong structural support defined by 0DTE and Monthly Max Pain, combined with heavy Monthly Put OI (533) and 0DTE Put OI (68).
Monthly Gamma Flip level aligning closely with the 24000 Max Pain, marking the absolute downside equilibrium for market makers.
Highest Weekly Call OI (548) and Volume (539) indicating a major dealer hedging anchor below the market.
